_comment: Router + state map for prompt-refiner (v0.1.0). Read FIRST. This skill is deliberately lean — it is a residue catcher + router, not an engine.
reinjection_rule: Re-read references/invariants.md before classifying a request (residue-gate) and before sharpening. Short by design.

state_files._comment: Durable state lives in files, not the conversation.

managed_project_signal: A project is genesis-managed iff docs/ AND genesis.tasks.json both exist (cheap glob). Drives the feature-request branch in residue-gate.md Step 2.
